provenance: Recorded in the Claude Code sandbox dev environment (not the actual GitHub Actions runner) via `node scripts/check-benchmark-regression.mjs --record`. The gated metric is each method's steps/sec *relative to explicit-euler on the same run*, not absolute steps/sec, specifically because that ratio is largely hardware-invariant -- it is dominated by each method's rhs-evaluations-per-step count (e.g. classical-rk4 costs ~4x an Euler step almost everywhere it runs), not by the CPU it happens to run on. `stepsPerSec` fields are recorded for trend/context only and are not compared. If a maintainer sees ratios drift outside noise once this has run for a while on the real CI runner, refresh this file with `--record` there.
